news.t: YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
UPDATE - YieldMax® ETFs Announces Weekly Distributions for Group 1 ETFs
YieldMax® Semiconductor Portfolio Option Income ETF (CHPY) Celebrates Its One-Year Anniversary
YieldMax® ETFs Announces Transition to Weekly Distributions Across Product Suite
YieldMax™ Launches Semiconductor Portfolio Option Income ETF (CHPY)

holdings.infoBox: CHPY is an equity ETF with a total of 93 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 5.90%, Micron Technology at 5.84%, Lam Research at 5.55%, NVIDIA at 5.40%, and Intel at 5.05%.

overview.description: The YieldMax Semiconductor Portfolio Option Income ETF (CHPY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of 15 to 30 US-listed semiconductor companies, complemented by various complex options strategies. The fund seeks to provide current income and, secondarily, capital appreciation. CHPY was launched on Apr 2, 2025 and is issued by YieldMax.

data.text: CHICAGO and MILWAUKEE and NEW YORK, June 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- YieldMax® ETFs announced distributions for the YieldMax® Group 1 weekly pay ETFs.
